Jul 14: Beringer (back) won't play in Monday's Summer League game against the Trail Blazers.

Jul 14: Huntley has been ruled out for Monday's Las Vegas Summer League game against the Bucks due to a hamstring injury, Duane Rankin of The Arizona Republic reports.

Jul 13: The Magic announced Monday that Nelson will undergo surgery to repair a fracture in his left ankle, and he's expected to return to basketball activities in 3-4 months.
